extra.message: Confirmed CSRF vulnerability across multiple browser-session-backed state-changing endpoints. No CSRF protection library or token validation is present anywhere in the application: app/flask_xss.py:22-27 configures Flask but does not enable Flask-WTF/CSRFProtect or any custom anti-CSRF checks; repository search found no csrf/CSRFProtect/WTF_CSRF usage; requirements.txt:1-7 also contains no CSRF helper dependency. HTML forms rendered by app/templates/components/forms.html:21-31 generate forms wit
